title: Splat Bridge XR
description: A web console to generate Gaussian-splat worlds into a Unity XR session over WebSocket.

sections.text: A phone-friendly web console and local bridge that drive World Labs Marble jobs and stream the resulting Gaussian-splat worlds into a Unity XR session over WebSocket.

While you’re in XR, a companion device on the same network opens the director UI, submits a Marble generation (text and optional photos), and the bridge downloads the SPZ and notifies Unity so the new splat world can be loaded in-headset without leaving the session.
